name: Akikawa Foods & Farms Co., Ltd.
summary: Akikawa Foods & Farms Co., Ltd. produces and sells food products. The company offers chicken, pork, beef, milk, yoghurt, eggs, vegetables, and frozen food, as well as processed food, etc. It also engages in breeding chickens, hens, and dairy cows; and production of vegetables and milk. The company was formerly known as Akikawa Food Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Akikawa Foods & Farms Co., Ltd. in 1993. Akikawa Foods & Farms Co., Ltd. was founded in 1932 and is headquartered in Yamaguchi, Japan.
